title: Scope
description: Scope: An optional scope tag for any object or collection of objects being evaluated using the Evaluate EPD compute method within the LifeCycleAssessment_Toolkit.

ScopeType.description: ScopeType used to describe the objects being evaluated. ScopeType: The scope of the collection of object you would like to evaluate.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
